summary: The artifact-only post-legal-acceptance closure audit satisfies the frozen contract. All 13 required tracked immutable MVP-03 evidence/verdict/problems refs exist and their immutable verdict refs are PASS. MVP-03 acceptance criteria are mapped to tracked evidence; the builder decision to record full MVP-03 as DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING is supported after this fresh verification because no concrete non-human proof gap remains. Human gates remain non-DONE and the MVP stage remains open.
non_blocking_notes: Latest verifier aliases still point to MVP-03-profile-session-legal-acceptance-ui-001 and status.json keeps MVP-03 pending parent sync. This is expected because this verifier may write only immutable verdict/problems artifacts; parent/orchestrator should perform alias/status sync after PASS.

Harness validation currently fails only on latest artifact id mismatch caused by the pending parent alias sync; the failure is classified as EXPECTED_FAIL_PENDING_PARENT_ALIAS_SYNC, not a sprint proof gap.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Employee understands what employer sees and does not see.
Privacy-card appears before diagnostics and explains that personal diagnostic answers, weak zones, exact sums and reflection details are not personal HR reports.
Consent versions are recorded and auditable.

additional_mvp_03_scope_mapping.scope: Profile, contact update and support-ready identity basics.

human_gates.gate: Final financial correctness of lessons, diagnostics, quizzes and explanations
Reward economy, stock, prices and fulfillment
Admin auth/role/audit policy for production use
Support answer policy for sensitive topics

docs_and_backend_checks.backend_schema_api_reason: This sprint is artifact-only and did not edit backend/schema/API/OpenAPI/generated-client files; cited backend/API slices retain their own PASS evidence.

commands.command: bash required refs loop over all 13 MVP-03 ids, checking evidence json/md, verdict json, problems md and verdict PASS

commands.detail: stage-artifacts mismatch: active/evidence point to MVP-03-post-legal-acceptance-closure-audit-001 while latest verdict/problems aliases still point to MVP-03-profile-session-legal-acceptance-ui-001.

commands.command: git diff --name-only -- docs apps packages content infra tests .agents .codex Makefile README.md
commands.detail: No production, canonical docs, tooling, app, package, content, infra or test paths were modified.
No tracked prior immutable proof refs or raw evidence changed; only current sprint immutable evidence refs were untracked before verifier artifacts.
